name: @forwardimpact/libeval
description: Agent evaluation framework — prove whether agent changes improved outcomes with reproducible evidence.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: An eval passes locally but fails in CI and the only output is 'assertion failed.'
jobs.bigHire: prove whether agent changes improved outcomes with reproducible evidence.
jobs.littleHire: run an eval and get a trace that shows exactly what the agent did.
jobs.competesWith: manual before/after comparison; trusting gut feeling over evidence; skipping evaluation entirely
